title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness-based treatments for posttraumatic stress disorder: a review of the

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Mindfulness-based treatments for posttraumatic stress disorder: areview of the treatment literature and neurobiological evidence.** — J Psychiatry Neurosci. PMID: 29252162. DOI: 10.1503/jpn.170021. Mindfulness-based treatments for posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD) have emerged as promising adjunctive or alternative intervention approaches. Ascoping review of the literature on PTSD treatment studies, including approaches such as mindfulness-based stress reduction, mindfulness-based cognitive therapy and metta mindfulness, reveals low attrition with medium to large effect sizes.
